scripts.postinstall: cd data && python3 -m venv venv; ./venv/bin/pip3 install -r requirements.txt
scripts.ingest: cd data; ./venv/bin/python3 ./import.py --url http://127.0.0.1:9200 --file ./Persona.json --index sample-prompt-persona; ./venv/bin/python3 ./import.py --url http://127.0.0.1:9200 --file ./Template.json --index sample-prompt-template
